productDisplayName: Bwitch Women Black Xtra Slim Shapewear
description: Black single piece shaping inner-wear, is padded and under-wired at the bust region, has broad removable shoulder straps, three hook and eye closures adjustable upto three points, boning at the sides to give a contour Fit and patterned and seamless spandex legs that comes approximately down to 5 inches below the crotch
